summary: Phase 1 (Bloodline Share Card PNG Exporter) frontend testing complete. Login → /deck → /feed (30 track cards, each with share + flip buttons) → Share modal opens with all required testids (share-card, download, share, close) → PNG download event fires (lyrica3-bloodline-trk_alpha_02.png) → Modal closes → Flip modal still opens (no regression) → /universal renders 8 bloodline cards each with Share Bloodline button, Network Gravity SVG intact → Universal share modal renders full ancestry chain (ROOT + FLIP 1/2/3 + '4 more ancestors'). All Phase 1 acceptance criteria PASS.

integration_issues.issue: Console logs two non-fatal SecurityError warnings from html-to-image when inlining Google Fonts CSS (fonts.googleapis.com stylesheet is CORS-restricted in preview). The library gracefully falls back and the PNG download still fires successfully (download event confirmed, filename=lyrica3-bloodline-<dna>.png). Cosmetically, the exported PNG may render system fonts instead of Unbounded/JetBrains Mono unless fonts are self-hosted or pre-embedded. Recommend self-hosting the critical font subsets (Unbounded, JetBrains Mono) or inlining as base64 woff2 in index.css for pixel-perfect TikTok/IG exports.

action_items: (Low priority, not blocking) Self-host Unbounded + JetBrains Mono font files inside the app (or inline base64) so html-to-image can embed them cross-origin without the fonts.googleapis.com CORS warning — this will also guarantee the exported PNG matches the on-screen design exactly on all devices. Current behavior: PNG export succeeds but may substitute serif/mono fallbacks in-image.
critical_code_review_comments: BloodlineShareCard.jsx: download() does not null-guard buildPng() result — if toPng returns null (cardRef not mounted), a.href = null would download an empty 'null' file. Minor: wrap in `if (!dataUrl) throw new Error('render failed')`.

FlipFeed.jsx is now 300 lines with TrackCard, FlipForm, RoyaltyTicker, and FlipFeed all co-located. Consider extracting TrackCard and FlipForm into their own files as the file approaches the 700-line threshold.

BloodlineShareCard share() falls back to navigator.share without files when file share is unsupported — on desktop this still invokes OS share sheet in Chrome/Edge but not Firefox. Acceptable fallback chain (files → url → clipboard+download).
Good: all new interactive elements have data-testid (share-card-btn-<dna>, share-bloodline-btn-<dna>, bloodline-* family). Excellent test coverage hooks.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded tracks and bloodlines.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Bloodline Share Card ships clean. 30 feed tracks × share button, 8 bloodline leaderboard cards × share button, modal renders brand/SynthID/CTA/stats/lineage correctly, download event fires in headless Chromium. Font-inline warnings from html-to-image are non-blocking; PNG export path works end-to-end. Next phases: Mutation Engine, Vocal Engine, Duo-Soul, stems ZIP — NOT yet built.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs found. Only observation: html-to-image prints non-fatal SecurityError warnings when trying to inline CORS-restricted Google Fonts stylesheet; PNG is still produced successfully.
